title: FinnGen Analysis Detail
description: View the results of a FinnGen genome-wide association study analysis for a specific endpoint. Review association statistics, Manhattan plots, QQ plots, and top GWAS hits filtered by significance threshold.
tips: Manhattan plots display –log10(p-value) for each SNP across the genome — peaks above the red line (p < 5×10⁻⁸) are genome-wide significant.
The QQ plot diagnoses population stratification and inflation — points deviating early from the diagonal may indicate confounding.
Top hits table is pre-filtered to p < 1×10⁻⁵ by default; adjust the threshold using the filter controls.
Click a significant variant to view its rsID, effect allele, odds ratio, and 95% confidence interval.
FinnGen endpoints are defined using Finnish national registry data — consult the endpoint documentation for case definitions.
